Avoid obstacles and plot the perfect route to the exit, all from the convenience of your browser. Dive into endless puzzle fun anywhere, anytime!

items.title: 100 Doors Escape Puzzle
items.description: Dive into the captivating "100 Doors Escape Puzzle," where your wits are your only ally. Navigate through a series of intricate rooms, solving clever puzzles to unlock mysterious doors. Every solved riddle brings you closer to freedom, ensuring addictive gameplay and a test of your puzzle-solving prowess.

items.title: Snakes and Ladders
items.description: Slide up ladders and dodge slithering snakes in this digital twist on the beloved classic. Roll the dice, embrace the thrill of chance, and race your friends or cunning AI opponents to the finish. Experience the nostalgic charm and excitement without the cleanup—only on GamePix!

items.title: Brain IQ test Mincraft Quiz
items.description: Test your Minecraft expertise with Brain IQ Test Minecraft Quiz, a fun intellectual challenge. Engage your reasoning and intuition through intriguing trivia and puzzles. Navigate a seamless interface and climb the leaderboard as you prove your mastery of the Minecraft universe. Take the challenge and see how much you really know!

items.title: Halloween Murder
items.description: Immerse yourself in a suspenseful Halloween adventure where you toggle between the roles of a cunning assassin and a savvy detective. Uncover secrets, solve intricate puzzles, and make strategic moves to expose or eliminate the target. Each moment counts as you strive to capture the throne or solve the mystery.

items.title: Mirrors - Puzzle
items.description: Unleash your intellect with Mirrors - Puzzle, where you strategize to connect light dots by placing mirrors. Reflect beams across minimalist boards, embracing increasing complexity with each level. Accessible in-browser, this captivating game challenges your planning skills for endless puzzling fun anytime, anywhere.

items.title: Zen Farm 2022
items.description: Cultivate peace in Zen Farm 2022, where tranquil farming meets strategic puzzles. Design lush landscapes, nurture crops, and raise happy animals. Balancing thoughtful decisions and creative planning, transform your farmstead into a thriving oasis. Enjoy immersive visuals and sounds as you delve into this captivating agricultural journey.

items.title: Falling Blocks - Tetris Game
items.description: Dive into the strategic challenge of Falling Blocks, where quick thinking and careful planning are your keys to success. Rotate and position blocks to clear lines, maintaining balance as speeds increase. Achieve combo-clearing lines for the ultimate high score in this addictive, retro-style block-stacking game.

items.title: Where is - Multiplayer
items.description: Challenge your memory and speed in "Where is - Multiplayer," a thrilling geography trivia duel. Race against friends to pinpoint countries on the map with accuracy and speed. Sharpen your world knowledge and prove your prowess in this exciting, competitive game. Who will reign as the geography champion?

items.title: Find the Sprunki
items.description: Find the Sprunki is a thrilling test of observation and precision, tasking players with uncovering hidden creatures across vibrant images. Tackle 12 escalating levels where every second counts, and accuracy is key. Each mistake costs crucial time, pushing you to balance speed with meticulous searching.

items.title: Sticky Balls - Match 3 Bubble Shooter
items.description: Clear vibrant clusters of sticky balls in this addictive match-3 bubble shooter. Strategize to unleash satisfying chain reactions and climb the global leaderboard. Engaging levels and vivid visuals create an exhilarating puzzle-solving adventure that sharpens your skills and offers endless fun against players worldwide. Ready for the challenge?

items.title: Exit - Puzzle
items.description: Exit - Puzzle offers a mind-bending adventure where you rotate intricate maze levels to guide a ball to its exit. Each level presents new obstacles and paths, requiring strategic thinking and precision. It's a thrilling brain workout with escalating challenges that keep puzzle lovers entertained for hours.

items.title: Line Creator - Match 3 Puzzle
items.description: Dive into vibrant, addictive fun with Line Creator - Match 3 Puzzle. Strategically connect colorful dots to unleash powerful combos and tackle engaging puzzles. With seamless controls and browser-based gameplay, this captivating adventure guarantees endless entertainment for all ages, challenging your wits and reflexes at every level.

items.title: The Sea Rush
items.description: Dive into The Sea Rush, an underwater match-3 puzzle adventure. Align sea creatures to unlock captivating marine mysteries while strategizing for the best combos. Quick reflexes earn high scores as enchanting graphics and escalating challenges keep you hooked on this aquatic escapade. Ready for the oceanic thrill?

items.title: Merge Cooking Game
items.description: Unleash your culinary creativity in Merge Cooking Game! Blend basic ingredients to form delectable dishes and expand your food empire. Explore endless combinations, unlock new cuisines, and renovate restaurants. Engage in daily challenges, use strategic power-ups, and collaborate with friends to elevate your kitchen's prestige!

items.title: Dungeon Chess
items.description: Dive into Dungeon Chess, where strategic puzzling meets dynamic RPG action. Navigate treacherous dungeons using a deck of chess-inspired cards, balancing tactical brilliance and chance. Embark on gripping adventures with six distinctive heroes across challenging realms, perfect for developing cunning strategies and mastering thrilling, ever-changing quests.

items.title: Fish Evolution
items.description: Dive into the mesmerizing depths of Fish Evolution, where merging vibrant fish leads to spectacular transformations. Explore strategic depths and witness evolving sea creatures as you protect your aquatic realm. With endless species and captivating visuals, get hooked on this thrilling puzzle adventure that keeps your strategy sharp and imagination afloat.

items.title: Get 10 Plus
items.description: Engage your mind with Get 10 Plus, where merging numbered tiles to reach '10' offers endless strategic challenges. Simple taps guide you through captivating puzzles that demand foresight and planning. With each move, test your numerical skills and indulge in its addictive, endlessly rewarding gameplay.

items.title: Cute Elements
items.description: Step into the charming world of Cute Elements, where strategy and fun unite! Link similar elements to clear levels as puzzles grow increasingly challenging. Delight in adorable graphics while your mind sharpens through thoughtful planning. Perfect for all ages, this addictive game is a delightful test of skill and wit.

items.title: Colors Maze
items.description: Illuminate every path in Colors Maze, a thrilling puzzle adventure that challenges your problem-solving skills across 20 increasingly complex levels. Strategize to avoid obstacles and master each maze, with the option to skip overly challenging sections. Can you conquer the glowing labyrinth with quick thinking and precision?

items.title: Grass Cutting Puzzle
items.description: Master the art of gardening with a twist in Grass Cutting Puzzle. Navigate intricate lawn layouts, strategize your paths, and cut through grass with precision. Experience increasing complexity in each level, challenging your tactical mind and rewarding you for smart, efficient moves. Are you ready to trim and win?

items.title: Coin Merge Machine
items.description: Dive into the mesmerizing world of "Coin Merge Machine," where simple mechanics meet exhilarating physics. Strategize your coin merges, unleash impressive combos, and watch your wealth soar. Open every treasure from bronze to gold while enjoying hours of captivating gameplay that will challenge your mind and indulge your senses.

items.title: Balloon Slicer
items.description: Balloon Slicer challenges your instincts as you deftly launch blades to burst balloons through complex, bouncy courses. Master the art of momentum with strategic throws, unlock new blades, and tackle increasingly clever layouts. Aim carefully, pop joy unyielding, and defend your reputation as the ultimate balloon popper.

items.title: Waffle Words
items.description: Dive into a fast-paced linguistic challenge with Waffle Words! In two minutes, form words from letter tiles to climb the scoreboard. Longer and rare-letter words earn you high scores. Enjoy simple gameplay that endlessly beckons for high-score chases!

items.title: Swatch Swap - Blocks Puzzle
items.description: Dive into Swatch Swap - Blocks Puzzle, a vibrant challenge where you strategically swap blocks to align colors in satisfying columns. With simple controls and captivating graphics, this game offers endless brain-teasing fun, demanding quick thinking and strategic planning through increasingly intricate puzzles. Perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

items.title: Baba Is You
items.description: Baba Is You transforms puzzle-solving into a creative adventure where you manipulate game rules by rearranging words. Guide the lovable Baba through beautifully designed levels, experimenting with every combination to alter reality and reach your goal. It's a delightful test of lateral thinking and imagination that captivates and challenges.

items.title: Don't Move
items.description: Sharpen your memory and perception in this tense game of precision and focus. Identify the subtly shifting monster on a screen filled with deceptive creatures. As the stakes rise, your ability to discern movement is crucial. Misstep, and it's game over. Stay alert—only the sharpest minds will prevail.

items.title: Italian Brainrot Anomaly
items.description: Immerse yourself in the bizarre chaos of Italian Brainrot Anomaly, a surreal "spot the difference" adventure. Navigate brainrot-infused illustrations filled with eccentric characters and absurd humor. Challenge your perception as you hunt down subtle or ridiculous discrepancies in this meme-filled visual fever dream.

items.title: Water Sort - Color Sort Puzzle
items.description: Dive into a colorful conundrum with Water Sort - Color Sort Puzzle. As the new sauce-sorting chef, master quick-thinking strategies to organize vibrant liquids under a ticking timer. Embrace escalating challenges and strategic pours in this engaging puzzle, ensuring each sauce finds its rightful bottle.

items.title: Watermelon Merge Saga
items.description: Collect and merge vibrant fruits in Watermelon Merge Saga to create larger varieties. Strategically manage your space to keep the box from overflowing, aiming for the biggest watermelon. Enjoy addictive gameplay with simple controls and compete for high scores in a lively, colorful world.

items.title: Your Past
items.description: In "Your Past," master time manipulation to solve intricate puzzles. Create past versions of yourself to press elusive buttons, strategize movements, and unlock advanced levels. Experience the thrill of controlling an army of clones as you navigate ever-complex challenges, pushing your strategic skills to new heights.

items.title: Hexa Sort 3D
items.description: Immerse yourself in Hexa Sort 3D, where strategic tiling meets calming aesthetics. Conquer increasingly complex levels by artfully stacking and merging hexagonal tiles. With each calculated move, navigate a landscape of tranquil logic, crafting higher-value tiles for a deeply rewarding and soothing puzzle experience.

items.title: Candy Blocks Game
items.description: Dive into a vibrant candy-themed puzzle adventure! Align colorful candy blocks to clear rows and score big. Test your strategic skills as levels become more challenging. With easy controls and addictive gameplay, see how high you can score while savoring sweet visuals!

items.title: Brainrot Merge
items.description: Unleash your inner chaos manager in Brainrot Drop Merge Challenge! Merge absurd creatures like laser-eyed monkeys in a madcap world of melting cities and meme mayhem. Dive into wild puzzles, embrace viral catchphrases, and master brain-melting logic in a surreal universe that’s both hilarious and addictive.

items.title: Draw to Home - Draw the Line
items.description: Guide your character home by drawing paths in this exciting puzzle adventure. Navigate obstacles, outsmart villains, and solve challenges with strategic line drawings. Can you find the perfect route to guide everyone safely home and outwit those who stand in your way? Unleash your creativity and problem-solving skills.

items.title: Don't Drop The Cup
items.description: Don't Drop The Cup challenges you to eliminate blocks beneath a balancing cup without it toppling. Navigate through increasingly tricky levels that test your logic and precision. Simple controls and progressively complex puzzles promise brain-teasing fun as you strive to keep the cup steady. Ready for the challenge?

items.title: Puzzle - Lines And Knots 1
items.description: Unwind with Puzzle - Lines And Knots 1, a serene logic game. Connect nodes by aligning lines on hexagonal tiles. Enjoy 100 levels of visually stunning challenges, accompanied by enchanting music. Perfect your strategy to unlock achievements and experience the meditative joy of intricate puzzle-solving.

items.title: Magic Kingdom. Hex Match
items.description: In Magic Kingdom: Hex Match, embark on a thrilling journey to build your own kingdom. Match colorful hexes to gather resources, unlocking magnificent structures along the way. With mesmerizing visuals and strategic depth, every move counts as you prove your worth and expand your realm in this captivating adventure.

items.title: Ropeway Master
items.description: Save the day in Ropeway Master by skillfully maneuvering a rope through intricate puzzles. Challenge your strategic mind as you navigate obstacles, clearing paths to rescue everyone. With each level increasing in complexity, experience the thrill of problem-solving and enjoy the satisfying rush of overcoming hurdles.

items.title: Queen of the Maze
items.description: Navigate intricate mazes in Queen of the Maze, a nostalgic puzzle adventure. Guide the Queen of Hearts to her castle by combining strategic planning and quick reflexes. Anticipate challenges, maneuver through increasingly complex labyrinths, and experience a delightful throwback to the golden era of PC gaming.

items.title: Happy Fruit Game
items.description: Embark on a vibrant journey in Happy Fruit Game, where you strategically merge identical fruits to evolve into a grand watermelon. Navigate thrilling challenges with simple tap-and-drag mechanics, adapt your strategy to tackle evolving fruit complexities, and keep the play area clear to emerge victorious.

items.title: 100 seconds Labyrinth
items.description: Navigate intricate mazes under pressure in 100 Seconds Labyrinth! Tackle mind-bending paths, shift perspectives swiftly, and reach the exit before time runs out. Each twist tests your reflexes and decision-making skills, ensuring a thrilling experience that demands quick thinking. Can you escape in time?

items.title: Barbee Doll Puzzles
items.description: Barbee Doll Puzzles invites you to challenge your mind with enchanting doll-themed images. Select from easy, medium, or hard puzzle modes, and piece together vibrant scenes. Dive into relaxing gameplay as you enhance your problem-solving skills while being captivated by delightful visuals. Enjoy hours of engaging entertainment!

items.title: Two x2
items.description: Dive into the captivating world of Two x2, where merging numbers on a grid evolves into an exhilarating strategic quest. With each calculated swipe, maneuver tiles to form larger multiples, testing your planning skills. Simple yet addictive, this game offers vibrant visuals and endless cognitive challenges.

items.title: 2048 Cube Merge Block
items.description: Swipe, aim, and release to merge cubes in this addictive puzzle challenge. Strategically combine numbers while avoiding obstacles to create higher-value cubes. With endless gameplay, the test lies in how high you can score. Can you conquer the puzzle and reach new heights?

items.title: Merge Fantasy
items.description: Immerse yourself in a magical island teeming with untapped resources. Gather, merge, and transform raw materials to rejuvenate the land. Friendly dragons accompany you as you unlock secrets, discover surprises, and craft powerful fusions. Experience the thrill of exploration and creation in this enchanting, ever-evolving adventure.

items.title: DOP in Love Story Find Part
items.description: Step into the shoes of a detective in this addictive puzzle adventure. Use a unique scanner tool to unveil hidden clues and solve mind-bending mysteries in a captivating love story. Embrace a stress-free experience with enchanting scenarios and unexpected twists, perfect for sharpening your critical thinking skills.

items.title: Bubble Up Endless
items.description: Strategically pop color-matched balls in Bubble Up Endless, where escalating complexities deliver a thrilling challenge. Navigate trickier levels with a diverse array of power-ups, from bombs to rainbows. Mastering booster use and executing clever strategies will unravel explosive chain reactions in this captivating bubble shooter adventure.

items.title: Color Bouncer Puzzle
items.description: Test your strategic skills with Color Bouncer Puzzle, where every swipe matters. Navigate the vibrant levels by bouncing a ball off platforms, each requiring precision and planning. With increasing challenges and addictive gameplay, every move offers new possibilities for endless fun on any device.

items.title: Rings Rotate
items.description: Rings Rotate invites you into a colorful world of puzzle-ring mastery. Engage your brain by aligning rings and unlocking intricate patterns, each level offering unique challenges. With seamless controls, stunning visuals, and the perfect balance of simplicity and complexity, every twist promises refreshing excitement.

items.title: Puzzles - Fantastic Creatures
items.description: Enter the imaginative realm of "Puzzles - Fantastic Creatures," where neural networks conjure stunning visual wonders. Piece together 30 captivating images to uncover extraordinary creatures, blending art and technology into a mesmerizing puzzle-solving experience. Each completed image reveals a new layer of enchantment and creativity.

items.title: Paint Sponges Puzzle
items.description: Unleash your creativity in Paint Sponges Puzzle, where vibrant colors and clever problem-solving collide. Navigate intricate 3D models with intuitive controls as each level grows in complexity. Strategize wisely, use each sponge's unique hue, and immerse yourself in a captivating world of challenging artistic puzzles.

items.title: Level EATEN!
items.description: Level EATEN! immerses you in vibrant worlds where mastering strategy is key. Consume blocks matching your size to grow and conquer thoughtfully crafted puzzles. With addictive gameplay and intuitive controls, you'll be strategizing, munching, and leveling up through captivating challenges in an ever-engaging loop.

items.title: Ultimate Maze
items.description: Dive into endless labyrinths with Ultimate Maze, where each twist offers a new adventure. Choose your challenge, from racing against time to navigating hidden paths. Collect treasures while exploring, and find the optimal route with simple controls, guaranteeing thrilling replayability in every run.

items.title: Unlock the Pattern
items.description: Crack the code by connecting intricate patterns in this addictive puzzle game. Each level challenges you with unique clues, from wallpapers to cryptic hints, all within a cleverly simulated phone interface. Unlock endless fun as you solve over 30 dynamic levels, keeping your brain engaged and entertained.

items.title: Turn On the Green Lights
items.description: Illuminate the path by expertly aiming and shooting a gleaming orb to activate all green lights, unveiling charming animals along the way. Dodge the menace of red lights, embrace escalating challenges, and use the fast forward to keep the excitement rolling. Can you master this dazzling puzzle adventure?

items.title: Glass Quest
items.description: Challenge your precision and timing in Glass Quest, where vibrant balls must perfectly fill a glass without spilling. Strategically aim to navigate escalating speed and complexity. Smooth animations and calming visuals make each level a captivating test of skill, balancing relaxation with thrilling tension. Can you master the drop?

items.title: Power Grid
items.description: Unravel the mysteries of Power Grid, a puzzle adventure guided by the witty AI entity, Synapse. Traverse intricate electrical landscapes filled with enigmatic challenges. With strategic depth and Synapse’s cheeky banter, every puzzle promises both intrigue and amusement as you inch closer to uncovering Synapse’s hidden narrative.

items.title: Duck Escape
items.description: Embark on a feathered adventure in Duck Escape, where clever problem-solving meets quick reflexes. Navigate visually stunning levels, collect keys, and unlock pathways to freedom. Embrace the thrill of strategic exploration and evade obstacles with agility and wit as you uncover hidden secrets and rise to new challenges.

items.title: Network - Puzzle
items.description: Dive into a vibrant grid in Network - Puzzle, where strategic mastery and quick thinking are key. Shift and align matching color blocks to unravel increasingly complex challenges. Enjoy an engaging experience with stunning visuals and intuitive controls, perfect for casual players and dedicated puzzle fans alike.

items.title: Push Out - Puzzle Adventure
items.description: Dive into Push Out - Puzzle Adventure, where strategic swiping and quick thinking guide blocks through tricky doors. With intuitive controls and levels that challenge your wits, enjoy a dynamic puzzle experience that constantly refreshes its charm, pushing you to solve one fun conundrum after another.

items.title: Water Sort - Color Puzzle Game
items.description: Water Sort - Color Puzzle Game offers an engaging brain exercise, where you logically sort vibrant liquids into bottles. As levels increase in complexity, the simple controls make it easy to strategize and master the art of color coordination. It’s an endless, colorful challenge that sharpens your mind.

items.title: Snake Swipe Puzzle
items.description: Guide a delightful block snake through intricate mazes in Snake Swipe Puzzle. Swipe to calculate every move, ensuring all paths are covered. Navigate increasingly challenging labyrinths with strategic thinking, offering a whimsical yet brain-teasing adventure that sharpens problem-solving skills. Lose yourself in this enchanting puzzle journey!

items.title: Dot Link Puzzle - Connect the Dots
items.description: Dive into Dot Link Puzzle - Connect the Dots, where vibrant colors meet strategic thinking. Connect matching dots without crossing paths in countless puzzles. Sharpen your logic and creativity in a soothing yet challenging environment, perfect for all ages seeking endless brain-teasing entertainment.

items.title: Puzzle Block Fill It Completely
items.description: Immerse yourself in vibrant puzzles where strategic block placement is key. Navigate an array of unique and challenging shapes, utilizing logic and creativity. With soothing mechanics and intuitive controls, find relaxation and delight while becoming a master of filling forms completely in this captivating brain-teaser.

items.title: Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle
items.description: Dive into Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle, where mechanical mastery meets intricate challenges. Navigate through wooden mazes, cleverly removing nuts and bolts to progress. With infinite levels and soothing nature sounds, this tension-free puzzle rewards problem-solving prowess and strategic thought in a calming atmosphere.

items.title: Bus Parking Out
items.description: Navigate a bustling 3D world in Bus Parking Out, where strategic planning meets vibrant visuals. Master unique bus mechanics, create efficient pathways, and collect color-coordinated passengers. Each level presents fresh challenges, ensuring an endlessly engaging journey as you perfect your logical prowess.

items.title: Merge Shapes
items.description: Immerse yourself in Merge Shapes, a strategic puzzle adventure where you merge similar tiles to evolve shapes, transforming them from basic outlines into vibrant forms. As complexity grows, strategize carefully to meet goals and advance through this captivating and colorful world. Every completed shape brings you closer to victory!

items.title: Physical Balls 2048
items.description: Merge identical bouncing balls to score big in this vibrant physics puzzler. Experience escalating challenges as you tackle new obstacles and ball types. Enjoy stunning visuals and smooth animations that enhance the addictive gameplay. Perfect for both casual and strategy fans, dive in and start merging today!

items.title: Fall Words
items.description: Unleash your typing prowess in Fall Words, where letters become physics-bound tools to solve puzzles and gather stars. Guided by a heartwarming alien tale, craft cunning words to navigate falling challenges, bridging creativity with strategy in a mesmerizing interstellar romance. Dive in for an innovative blend of skill and story.

items.title: Gerrymandering Master
items.description: Manipulate district boundaries with precision in Gerrymandering Master. Outsmart your opponents by strategically crafting districts to secure victory. Navigate the tense political landscape where cunning tactics win the day. Ultimate success hinges on mastering the art of influence. Will you rise as the undisputed electoral strategist?

items.title: Tiled Farm - Swipe and Solve
items.description: Immerse yourself in Tiled Farm, where you strategically swipe adorable animals across vibrant tiles to cover every cell. With deceptively simple mechanics, this captivating puzzle game challenges your logic and creativity. Delight in its colorful charm while honing your mental muscles through endlessly satisfying, brain-boosting fun!

items.title: Screw Puzzle Master
items.description: Dive into a brain-teasing adventure with Nuts & Bolts! Challenge your problem-solving skills by strategically unscrewing wood nuts and bolts. Each puzzle presents a riveting test of logic and precision. Enjoy the thrill of untangling complex screw-ups and master the art of clever deconstruction.

items.title: Blocks Arcade
items.description: Get ready to swipe and strategize in Blocks Arcade, a vibrant puzzle adventure that challenges your reflexes and planning skills. Connect colorful blocks to clear the board and trigger thrilling chain reactions. With its addictive gameplay and endless possibilities, embark on a journey of endless match-three fun!

items.title: Hoop Sort Fever
items.description: Get hooked on Hoop Sort Fever, a vibrant ring-stacking puzzle game that challenges you to organize colorful hoops by color. With unlimited resets and no time limits, you can experiment with strategies, undo moves, or skip levels to master this addictive, brain-tingling experience.

items.title: Finger Heart Monster Refill
items.description: Let your creativity flow with Finger Heart Monster Refill, where charming shape-shifting monsters bend to form a perfect heart. Use intuitive touch controls to align them, discovering countless ways to shape your masterpiece. It's relaxing, whimsical fun suitable for dreamers of all ages.

items.title: Alex Meets Ally Autumn
items.description: Unite Alex and Ally by skillfully hooking Alex to various objects. Engage in a challenging puzzle adventure where collecting stars unlocks new possibilities, and time is of the essence. The quicker your reunion, the higher your score. Can you master the mechanics and bring them together?

items.title: Elip Adventure
items.description: Embark on Elip Adventure, a thrilling journey as an ellipse navigating dynamic maps. Strategically collect stars to unlock new stages while outsmarting cunning adversaries. With simplified controls, hidden paths, and energy boosts, every level brings a test of wit and dexterity in a visually stunning 2D world.

items.title: Hexa Stack Sort
items.description: Hexa Stack Sort challenges you to strategically stack matching hexagonal blocks and clear targets for new moves. Navigate escalating puzzles, earn materials, and construct captivating structures. Exercise your problem-solving skills and relish the satisfaction of progression as you tackle ever-more intricate levels.

items.title: Save the Doge
items.description: Dive into a whimsical world where creativity holds the key to saving adorable animals. With every line you draw, challenge your wits and imagination to outsmart relentless bee swarms. Each unique sketch unfolds engaging puzzles, making every level a delightful test of your problem-solving genius. Save the day!

items.title: Landmine Cube
items.description: Guide a glowing cube through perilous levels, collecting jewels while avoiding hidden mines. Master strategic moves and utilize the cube's unique glow indicator to steer clear of danger. With challenging puzzles that test your memory and careful planning, Landmine Cube delivers a thrilling and addictive puzzle experience.

items.title: Bolts and nuts
items.description: Become a master strategist in Bolts and Nuts, where each click dictates the fall of planks. Engage in thought-provoking levels, unravel intricate bolt patterns, and outsmart friends in a battle of wits. Every move tests your logic, transforming simple puzzles into a thrilling mental workout.

items.title: Test Tubes. Water Sort
items.description: Test Tubes. Water Sort is a vibrant puzzle challenge where you strategically pour colored water between tubes until each contains a single color. With escalating complexity, this brain-teasing adventure demands clever moves and temporary storage tactics, offering both mental exercise and satisfying progression.

items.title: Kiss Me
items.description: In Kiss Me, guide a loving couple through intricate puzzles filled with tricky enemies. Use careful planning and sharp problem-solving skills to evade hurdles and reunite the pair. Enjoy delightful graphics and progressively challenging levels that promise endless fun and a heartwarming adventure.

items.title: Dot and Box
items.description: Connect the dots to form lines and claim squares in a strategic battle of wits! With each move, shape the board and seize victory by creating more boxes than your opponent. Fun and challenging, it's a test of foresight and cunning where every decision counts.

items.title: GridMaster
items.description: GridMaster offers a soothing yet demanding puzzle experience. Strategically place shapes on a 9x9 grid to clear lines and squares, channeling the spirit of Sudoku. With intuitive controls and a minimalist design, plan each move meticulously to achieve high scores in your own time.

items.title: Cubicoe
items.description: Experience Tic Tac Toe like never before with Cubicoe's 3D cube challenge. Strategically rotate and flip the cube to outsmart opponents, but beware of unexpected twists! Race against time to claim your victory, earn coins, and personalize your game with exclusive upgrades. Can you conquer every side?

items.title: Screw Puzzle : Nuts & Bolts
items.description: Embark on a mechanical journey with Screw Puzzle, where every unscrew, slide, and rotation tests your logic and precision. Plan each move carefully to dismantle intricate structures in this addictive puzzle experience. With realistic physics and unique challenges, unleash your inner strategist and conquer increasingly complex puzzles.

items.title: Image Puzzle
items.description: Image Puzzle offers a delightful challenge as you swap pieces to complete stunning images. Tackle 3x3 or 4x4 grids, customize pictures, and enjoy seamless controls across devices. Race against the clock, unlock varied puzzles, and compete for top scores while keeping the experience fresh and engaging.

items.title: Detective Loupe Puzzle
items.description: Step into the role of a detective in the captivating world of Detective Loupe Puzzle. Explore intricate crime scenes, unearth hidden clues, and interrogate shady characters using your magnifying glass. Each level challenges your sleuthing skills with new mysteries to unravel and innocent lives to save.

items.title: Fifteen
items.description: Dive into the puzzling world of Fifteen, where strategic tile shifts bring chaotic grids into order. Choose your grid size for a unique challenge every time. Plan wisely, as each move could unlock new paths or lead to puzzles unsolvable. Perfect for honing your problem-solving skills.

items.title: Block Pusher Voxel World 3D
items.description: Dive into a captivating 3D puzzle adventure where every move matters. Navigate intricate voxel landscapes inspired by classic block-pushing challenges. Perfect for those who love to strategically solve and conquer, this addictive game offers endless mind-bending fun in a familiar cube-filled universe.

items.title: Ghost Hunters
items.description: Uncover spectral secrets in Ghost Hunters! Navigate challenging puzzles by strategically placing flashlights to illuminate hidden ghosts. With 60 intricate levels, sharpen your mind and solve mysteries lurking in the shadows. Can you bring light to every corner of the haunted house? Step in and find out!

items.title: Pin Puzzle Love Story
items.description: Guide characters safely in Pin Puzzle Love Story by strategically pulling pins to avoid perilous traps and reunite the couple. Enjoy increasingly challenging brain teasers that stimulate your logic skills in a relaxing and delightful atmosphere, rewarding patience and careful planning with heartwarming reunions.

items.title: Dog Blocks
items.description: Immerse yourself in Dog Blocks, a puzzle game that challenges you to fill block spaces using dog-themed pieces. As levels become more intricate, test your spatial skills with strategic placements and innovative thinking. Perfect for casual play, enjoy the engaging and progressively demanding puzzles each step of the way.

items.title: 2048 - Link 'n Merge
items.description: Combine matching number bubbles in "2048 - Link 'n Merge" to reach the ultimate goal of 2048. Strategically link and merge while navigating a dynamic, puzzle-filled board, employing power-ups wisely. Enjoy a mesmerizing number puzzle challenge that tests your mind and keeps you coming back for more.

items.title: Merge Fellas Italian Brainrot
items.description: Dive into a zany merge puzzle adventure where quirky characters evolve into bizarre creations. Unleash chaos and humor by combining Brainrot fellas, pushing your strategic limits to uncover the wildest transformations. Can you unravel the ultimate twist in this addictive, laughter-filled challenge?

items.title: Blast Sprunki
items.description: Guide the endearing Green Sprunki through a shadowy world in this whimsical adventure. Strategically place explosives to navigate challenging terrains and hazards. With each level, sharpen your timing and strategy to achieve a perfect three-star rating. Embrace creativity to overcome every obstacle and master the art of precision.

items.title: Car Escape Traffic Puzzle Game
items.description: Navigate intricate traffic puzzles as you slide vehicles out of tight spots in Car Escape Traffic Puzzle Game. Test your logic and strategy to free trapped cars from bustling city streets. With escalating difficulty, simple controls, and immersive scenarios, this captivating brain teaser promises endless entertainment for puzzle enthusiasts.

items.title: Sprunki Drop
items.description: Embark on a whimsical escape with Sprunki in a physics-driven puzzle adventure. Clear 60 cleverly designed levels by strategically removing blocks to land safely. Every tap requires precision, every move a plan—immerse yourself in engaging challenges that demand timing and skill for endless brain-teasing fun.

items.title: Search Hidden Objects Find It
items.description: Test your observation skills in Search Hidden Objects Find It, a fast-paced race to locate hidden objects before your opponent. Dive into cluttered scenes, spot tricky items, and earn rewards to customize your hub. Compete, conquer, and showcase your keen eye in this challenging visual puzzle adventure.

items.title: Word Up
items.description: Dive into Word Up, where a grid of letters awaits your swift creativity! Form as many words as fast as you can, tackling thrilling challenges and earning combo points for impressive word lengths. Earn helpful bonuses and enjoy this addictive, educational puzzle, perfect for wordsmiths with quick wits!

items.title: Emoji Puzzle Riddle
items.description: Dive into Emoji Puzzle Riddle, a delightful logic game where you strategically connect emojis across over 100 vibrant levels. Enjoy a jolly atmosphere with visually pleasing graphics, unlockable skins, and a progression system that tests your problem-solving skills while keeping the excitement alive.

items.title: Skibidi Toilet Puzzle
items.description: Navigate a world of quirky bathroom puzzles in Skibidi Toilet Puzzle! Solve creatively designed challenges with simple controls as you strategize your escape route. Each hilarious scenario requires quick thinking and a keen eye, ensuring endless laughter and brain-teasing fun as you cleverly maneuver your way to victory.

items.title: Claw & Merge Labubu Drop
items.description: Dive into "Claw & Merge: Labubu Drop," where merging adorable jelly dolls brings endless fun. Match identical Labubus, watch them evolve into new characters, and earn coins to master the claw machine. Can you collect every unique Labubu in this charming puzzle adventure?

items.title: Magic 15 Puzzle
items.description: Slide and swap numbered tiles to master the classic 15 puzzle! Strategically maneuver the pieces into their correct order, using your wits and speed to conquer each configuration. Simple yet challenging, this timeless puzzler is perfect for quick brain-teasing fun.

items.title: Crumpled Pictures
items.description: Unravel crumpled pictures to reveal their hidden beauty! Straighten, collect, and sort images into your personal album while earning coins. Challenge yourself for higher rewards, unlock achievements, and compete with others. Expand your album or discard less-loved photos as you aim for picture-perfect glory!

items.title: Portal Slingshot
items.description: Portal Slingshot combines mind-bending puzzles with gravity-defying platforming. Master the art of navigating intricate levels by skillfully placing portals to create unexpected paths. Tackle challenges with precision aiming and keen problem solving, and savor sweet rewards as you unravel each layer of this mesmerizing puzzle adventure.

items.title: Animals Merge
items.description: Embark on a charming adventure by merging adorable creatures to evolve majestic animals in Animals Merge. With intuitive controls and captivating gameplay, strategically match pairs to progress and tackle increasing challenges. Delight in vibrant visuals while testing your skills in this addictive and immersive puzzle experience.

items.title: Date the Difference
items.description: Embark on captivating dates where keen observation unlocks romance! Engage with charming companions and sharpen your attention to detail in this delightful spot-the-difference adventure. The more you notice, the deeper your connection grows. Can you spot every detail and win their hearts?

items.title: Emoji Sudoku
items.description: Dive into Emoji Sudoku, a playful twist on the classic puzzle. Replace numbers with charming emojis and challenge your brain in a vibrant and delightful atmosphere. Unleash your creativity and logical thinking as you solve each whimsical grid. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts looking for a fresh experience!

items.title: Brain Test IQ Challenge 2
items.description: Embrace the ultimate brain workout with Brain Test IQ Challenge 2. Navigate quirky puzzles by drawing paths, dodging obstacles, and escaping mazes. Whether clashing with friends or conquering solo challenges, each level promises clever twists that ignite your problem-solving skills and tickle your imagination. Unleash your inner logic master!

items.title: Sprunki Find Tung Tung Tung Sahur
items.description: Embark on a whimsical journey to find the elusive Tung Tung Tung Sahur! Dive into vibrant, chaotic scenes blending Sprunki and Minecraft charm. Sharpen your observation skills to uncover hidden figures before time ticks away in this thrilling, fast-paced hunt. Can you master each challenging level?

items.title: Cube Blast
items.description: Unleash chaos in Cube Blast! Strategically align blocks to annihilate rows, earning points in this addictive puzzle frenzy. Perfect your strategy, maximize combos, and climb the leaderboard in this fast-paced, block-busting adventure.

items.title: Nuts Bolts Screw Glass
items.description: Dive into a world of physics-based puzzles where strategic thinking rules. Unscrew bolts to provoke mesmerizing chain reactions that send gears spinning and glass targets shattering. Analyze, predict, and execute the perfect sequence in hundreds of challenging levels. Embrace the art of disassembly and experience the thrill of precision.

items.title: Rope Color Sort 3D
items.description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of Rope Color Sort 3D, a captivating puzzle adventure. Sort colorful ropes into their matching tubes, sharpen your logical skills, and enjoy the stunning 3D visuals. Challenge yourself in a relaxing yet intellectually stimulating experience that will keep you coming back for more.

items.title: Save the Girl Puzzle Escape
items.description: Navigate quirky scenarios in Save the Girl: Puzzle Escape! Exercise your mind by choosing the right actions to guide the heroine through hilarious predicaments. Relish in vibrant, stress-free adventures where every decision leads to either triumphant success or comedic mishaps. It’s a delightful test of wit and creativity!

items.title: Link All
items.description: Embark on a brain-teasing adventure with Link All, where each level challenges you to create uninterrupted paths across intricate grids. Strategize to outsmart tricky barriers, revisit special nodes, and unlock seamless bridge crossings. With fresh surprises at every turn, keep thinking creatively and connecting the dots!

items.title: Sokoban_PR
items.description: Challenge your mind with Sokoban_PR, a minimalistic twist on classic puzzles. Guide your charming loader to strategically maneuver boxes to their destinations. Enjoy the satisfaction of crafting solutions as levels increase in complexity, honing your skills with every move. Every step is crucial in this engaging journey.

items.title: Shape Of Shadow
items.description: Uncover hidden realms as you manipulate shadows into tangible paths in Shape of Shadow. Navigate stunning, mysterious landscapes while solving intricate puzzles. Transform shadows to outsmart lurking adversaries in this mesmerizing journey. Enjoy solo or with friends as dynamic play blends light with dark in a gripping adventure.

items.title: Hard Maze
items.description: Dive into a world of complex mazes, each more challenging than the last! Hard Maze offers a brain-teasing adventure, where strategic planning and sharp reflexes are key to success. Navigate dynamic labyrinths, avoid deceptive paths, and beat your best times in a seamless and addictive puzzle experience.

items.title: Shift Puzzle
items.description: Shift Puzzle immerses you in a colorful world where strategy and simplicity unite. Maneuver blocks to their starry destinations by tapping them thoughtfully, honing your logic and spatial skills. As levels progress, challenges intensify, promising endless hours of engaging and enjoyable puzzle-solving excitement.

items.title: Connector Puzzle
items.description: Connector Puzzle invites you into a world where logic meets creativity. Strategically connect all the dots without any gaps to solve increasingly complex challenges. With intuitive controls and puzzles that sharpen your mind, this game is perfect for those seeking both relaxation and mental stimulation.

items.title: Magic Finger Puzzle 3d
items.description: Unleash your magical laser-firing fingers to navigate treacherous puzzles and obstacles. Strategically break cages, move boxes, and neutralize enemies in your quest to rescue your partner. With physics-based mechanics and escalating challenges, every shot counts in this captivating journey of wits and precision.

items.title: Connect Image Master
items.description: Immerse yourself in the intriguing world of Connect Image Master, where each puzzle challenges your logic and visual acuity. Assemble intricate images from scattered pieces, mastering increasingly complex collages as you progress. With every completed picture, experience a satisfying sense of accomplishment while navigating this captivating, mind-stretching journey.

items.title: Dop Puzzle Erase Master
items.description: Uncover hidden secrets in each image by cleverly erasing parts of the scene in Dop Puzzle Erase Master. With intuitive mechanics, embark on a journey that challenges your strategic thinking and creativity as you progress through increasingly complex puzzles, offering endless addictive fun.

items.title: Cube Crazy Boom
items.description: Dive into the vibrant world of Cube Crazy Boom, where finding hidden particles within contrasting cubes is your challenge. With escalating difficulty across ten levels, you'll need speed and precision to earn stars. Keep your eyes sharp for color differences and race to outsmart each vibrant puzzle!

items.title: GreenBal
items.description: In GreenBal, engage in a cerebral duel where your opponent takes two steps for every one of yours. Outsmart the cunning AI using critical thinking. With each victory, face increasingly savvy adversaries, enhancing your strategic prowess in this compelling test of wits.

items.title: Little Panda Match 3
items.description: Dive into the enchanting world of Little Panda Match 3, where strategic swapping of adorable animal tiles creates delightful combos. Navigate through stunning levels, using clever moves and special tiles to conquer challenges. This charming puzzle adventure offers relaxation and brain-teasing fun for everyone.

items.title: Crazy Cookies Match & Mix
